quarantinedTests.testName: formats month correctly based on locale
quarantinedTests.failureDescription: Locale mismatch: test expects month name in French locale (e.g. 'decembre') but CI runner returns English ('December'). Fails across unrelated branches, indicating an environment-dependent flaky test.
